remarks: Welcome home to Unit 8E at 50 Glenbrook Road, where city convenience seamlessly blends with comfort. Arriving at the Soundview Towers, you are greeted by a warm sense of security and community, supported by a welcoming front desk receptionist and a secure, polished lobby. Inside, this remarkably spacious 1,079 square foot residence gives you an immediate sense of openness. The layout maximizes every inch, flowing effortlessly into a bright living and dining area framed by wide windows that draw the outside in. But the true highlight is your private balcony - the perfect spot for sipping morning coffee or unwinding against a backdrop of sweeping city views of Glenbrook that become absolutely magical at night as the skyline lights up. The primary bedroom is expansive and sun drenched, with lots of closet space, complemented by a full bath and a convenient half bath for guests. The interior boasts brand new flooring throughout and the kitchen has high quality wood cabinetry and new stainless steel appliances. The building also boasts premier resort style amenities. You can bypass gym memberships and enjoy the fully equipped on site fitness center and sauna, or spend sunny summer days lounging by the sparkling in ground pool and sundeck. Life here truly is beautiful and effortless.
